data.name: EmailLog.Resend.NotFailed
data.value: that email already sent successfully — nothing to recover.

data.name: EmailLog.Resend.NotResendable
data.value: that send has no template/person on record (e.g. a broadcast or sign-in code), so it cannot be re-sent from the log.

data.name: EmailLog.Resend.ParticipantGone
data.value: that person is no longer in this edition.

data.name: EmailLog.Resend.NotFound
data.value: that log entry was not found in this edition.

data.name: Leads.Contact.Intro
data.value: Every lead, inquiry and booth meeting captured for your company. You don't need the API or a script — tap a name to email or call them straight away.

data.name: Leads.Contact.Empty
data.value: No leads captured for your company yet. They'll appear here as your booth staff capture them or as they sync in.

data.name: Leads.Contact.NoContact
data.value: No email or phone on this lead.

data.name: Layout.TicketInfo
data.value: ELDK27 ticket sale starts 11 Aug 2026 at 08:00 (Danish time)

data.name: Layout.FooterFree
data.value: free for any community to use.

data.name: MasterClass.WaitlistPolicy.1
data.value: The waitlist only opens once a master class is full, so you can't join the waitlist for a class that still has available seats.

data.name: MasterClass.WaitlistPolicy.2
data.value: You can be on one waitlist at a time.

data.name: MasterClass.WaitlistPolicy.3
data.value: If you join a waitlist while already holding a seat in another master class, joining alone won't cancel anything. Your existing seat is only cancelled if a spot opens up in the waitlisted class and you're moved into it. Waitlisted participants are admitted in the order they signed up.

data.name: Games.Intro
data.value: Three quick, timed quizzes — AI, Intune and Security. Answer fast and correctly to climb the leaderboard. Top scorers win prizes!

data.name: Games.None
data.value: No games are available right now.

data.name: Games.NotAvailable
data.value: This game isn't available right now.

data.name: Games.SpeedHint
data.value: Faster correct answers score more — beat the clock!

data.name: Games.LeaderboardIntro
data.value: Top players by score (ties broken by fastest time)

data.name: Games.NoScoresYet
data.value: No one has finished this quiz yet — be the first!

data.name: Games.NotPlayedYet
data.value: You haven't finished this quiz yet.

data.name: Login.PrestageTipSummary
data.value: Tip: bookmark a one-click sign-in for each account

data.name: Login.PrestageTipBody
data.value: Add your email to the page address and this field is pre-filled, so you only click “Send my sign-in code”. Bookmark one link per account to switch between several logins fast:

data.name: Login.EnterCode
data.value: Enter the 6-digit code we emailed you

data.name: Login.RememberMeHelp
data.value: Stay signed in on this device until you sign out. Leave unticked on a shared computer.

data.name: Login.MagicInvalid
data.value: This sign-in link is invalid or has expired. Request a fresh sign-in code below.

data.name: Login.MagicInactive
data.value: This sign-in link is no longer valid because the account is inactive. Please contact the organizers.

data.name: Login.RecoverHelp
data.value: No problem — we'll take you to sign in with your email and a one-time code.

data.name: Hub.CalendarIntro
data.value: Subscribe once and your reminders & deadlines stay in sync in your own calendar — new items appear automatically.

data.name: Hub.CalendarHowTo
data.value: How do I add this? (Outlook · Google · Apple)

data.name: MyEvent.CheckedInToast
data.value: You're checked in. Have a great event!

data.name: Speaker.AccessDenied
data.value: The speaker hub is only for speakers and master-class speakers.

data.name: Speaker.JourneyIntro
data.value: Everything you owe us from "accepted" to "on-stage", in one place. Tick a milestone when it's done; the countdown shows what's coming up next.

data.name: Speaker.NoMilestones
data.value: No speaker milestones have been set up yet — check back soon.

data.name: Speaker.AllComplete
data.value: All milestones complete — you're all set. See you on stage!

data.name: Speaker.DetailsOnFile
data.value: Your speaker details are on file.

data.name: Speaker.DetailsPending
data.value: We still need your accreditation, country and speaking days.

data.name: Speaker.MySessionsIntro
data.value: The sessions you're presenting — when and where, plus a link to the attendee questions for each.

data.name: Speaker.RatingsIntro
data.value: See how attendees rated your sessions, with their anonymous comments.

data.name: Speaker.PublicPreviewLive
data.value: Your profile is live on the public speaker line-up. Preview exactly how attendees see your bio and photo.

data.name: Speaker.PublicPreviewPending
data.value: Your public profile preview unlocks once the organizers announce the line-up. Until then, polish your bio and photo so you're ready — your edits are kept.

data.name: Speaker.CalendarHeading
data.value: Add my deadlines to my calendar

data.name: Speaker.CalendarIntro
data.value: Subscribe once and your speaker deadlines stay in sync in your own calendar — new and moved dates appear automatically.

data.name: Common.EditingClosed
data.value: Editing is closed for this event. Contact the organizers for changes.

data.name: Common.EditingClosedShort
data.value: Editing is closed for this event.

data.name: Common.OrganizersOnly
data.value: This area is for organizers only.

data.name: OrgGrid.BulkConfirmBody
data.value: This will apply to {0} selected row(s). Continue?

data.name: OrgGrid.BulkPickFirst
data.value: Pick at least one row first.

data.name: Find.Intro
data.value: Search every participant in this edition by name or email and jump straight to them.

data.name: Find.Prompt
data.value: Type a name or email above to find someone.

data.name: Find.ResultsCaption
data.value: People matching the search, with a link to open each one.

data.name: Find.OpenInGrid
data.value: Open these results in the full participants grid

data.name: OrgPeople.FindPerson
data.value: Search every participant by name or email and jump straight to them.

data.name: OrgHotels.Intro
data.value: Define the hotels attendees are split across. Then assign each person to a hotel and set their confirmation number.

data.name: OrgHotels.Empty
data.value: No hotels yet. Add the first one above.

data.name: OrgHotels.ConfirmDelete
data.value: Delete this hotel? Assigned people will be un-assigned.

data.name: OrgHotels.BulkDeleteHint
data.value: Tick the hotels to remove. Anyone placed in a deleted hotel is automatically un-assigned (their participant record is kept).

data.name: OrgHotels.BulkDeleteConfirmBody
data.value: This permanently removes {0} selected hotel(s) and un-assigns anyone placed in them. This cannot be undone.

data.name: OrgHotelAssign.Intro
data.value: Assign each participant to a hotel and set their confirmation number. People are grouped by hotel so you can manage the room block per hotel.

data.name: OrgHotelAssign.NoHotels
data.value: Define at least one hotel first on

data.name: OrgHotelAssign.GroupEmpty
data.value: No one assigned to this hotel yet.

data.name: Hub.HotelOnFile
data.value: Your hotel preference is on file.

data.name: Hub.HotelNotYet
data.value: You have not submitted a hotel preference yet.

data.name: Hub.DinnerOnFile
data.value: Your dinner RSVP is on file.

data.name: Hub.DinnerNotYet
data.value: Please let us know if you will attend the dinner.

data.name: Hub.VolShiftsNotYet
data.value: Please submit which shifts you can work.

data.name: Hub.VolWorkNone
data.value: No tasks assigned yet — check back, or ask an organizer.

data.name: MySchedule.Intro
data.value: All your shifts and tasks in one place, in time order. See where and when, who to ask for help, and add them to your own calendar.

data.name: MySchedule.Empty
data.value: You have no shifts or tasks yet. When a supervisor or organizer assigns you to one, it'll appear here.

data.name: MySchedule.AddToCalendar
data.value: Add my schedule to my calendar

data.name: MySchedule.CalendarIntro
data.value: Subscribe once and your shifts stay in sync in your own calendar — new and updated shifts appear automatically.

data.name: MyShifts.Intro
data.value: For each shift you are assigned, confirm you can take it, decline it, or ask to swap it. Read the instructions for each shift here too. A coordinator picks up anything you decline or want to swap.

data.name: MyShifts.Empty
data.value: You have no assigned shifts yet. When a coordinator assigns you to one, it will appear here for you to confirm, decline or swap.

data.name: MyShifts.Withdraw
data.value: Undo — I can take it after all

data.name: MyShifts.NotePlaceholder
data.value: Add a short reason for the coordinator…

data.name: Hub.SponsorAreaIntro
data.value: Your company's onboarding tasks appear in the Pending / Completed lists above. The two pages below give you the full view + the inline edit forms.

data.name: Hub.AttendeeReserved
data.value: You have reserved a Master Class seat.

data.name: Hub.AttendeeMultiple
data.value: You have more than one Master Class booking - please keep one and cancel the others.

data.name: Hub.AttendeeNone
data.value: You have not reserved a Master Class seat yet.

data.name: Hub.OrganizerToolsIntro
data.value: Attendee reconciliation, sponsor orders, and task management.

data.name: Fresh.Intro
data.value: When each data source was last fed. A source quieter than expected is flagged so you can check whether a sync stopped.

data.name: Fresh.AllFresh
data.value: Every data source is up to date.

data.name: Fresh.StaleCount
data.value: {0} data source(s) look stale — worth a check.

data.name: Sh.Intro
data.value: Proof that this hub still mirrors Zoho's live orders and attendees.

data.name: Sh.InSyncBanner
data.value: The mirror is in sync with Zoho.

data.name: Sh.StaleBanner
data.value: The last successful sync was {0} — older than the {1}-hour window. Check whether the sync job has stopped.

data.name: Sh.NeverBanner
data.value: No successful sync has run for this edition yet.

data.name: Sh.NoDrift
data.value: No drift — every active ticket links to an order and every active order has attendees.

data.name: Sh.AttendeesNoOrder
data.value: Active attendees with no linked order

data.name: Hotel.PolicyBody
data.value: we arrange and cover 1 night hotel for speakers checking in the day BEFORE the main conference day, and 2 nights for master-class speakers and speakers running a workshop on the pre-day. Pick Yes, I need a hotel room and your check-in / check-out dates, OR pick No, I don't need a hotel — either is a valid completed answer.

data.name: Hotel.PolicySpeaker
data.value: If you'd like a hotel, we'll arrange and cover it based on the response you provide in the hub form. We will cover two nights for masterclass speakers and one night for technical session speakers (main day). If you'd like to stay longer, any extra nights would be at your own expense.

data.name: Hotel.PolicyVolunteer
data.value: We will arrange and cover hotel, if you want it, based on your response in the hub form. Hotel coverage depends on the days where you have agreed to help us.

data.name: Hotel.NotRelevant
data.value: Hotel isn't part of your participation — attendees and sponsors arrange their own accommodation.

data.name: Hotel.NeedRoomLegend
data.value: Do you need a hotel room?

data.name: Hotel.YesNeed
data.value: Yes, I need a hotel room

data.name: Hotel.NoNeed
data.value: No, I don't need a hotel

data.name: Dinner.AccessDenied
data.value: The appreciation dinner is by invitation based on your participation. Your current entitlement does not include the dinner — if you believe this is a mistake, please contact the organizers.

data.name: Dinner.IntroBody
data.value: We appreciate that you take the time to join us for #{0} — and would like to invite all speakers, volunteers, appreciation sponsors, VIP guests and organizers to our appreciation dinner on {1} at {2} at 18:00 / 6 pm.

data.name: Dinner.BeforeNote
data.value: This is the evening BEFORE the main conference day — please make your travel plans accordingly.

data.name: Dinner.RsvpNo
data.value: — I won't be able to make it.

data.name: Dinner.MaybeNote
data.value: (final Yes / No must be given no later than {0} due to logistics planning)

data.name: Dinner.PlusOne
data.value: If attending, are you bringing guests? (plus-ones, 0 if none)

data.name: Dinner.Allergies
data.value: Allergies — please avoid this in my food!

data.name: Dinner.IcsNote
data.value: A calendar invitation (.ics) will be emailed to {0} as soon as you save YES.

data.name: Lunch.AccessDenied
data.value: The lunch form is only for volunteers, speakers, master-class speakers, organizers and media crew. Your role ({0}) is not in the lunch headcount.

data.name: Lunch.Intro
data.value: We need a headcount for the lunches on the days before the main conference, so the venue can cater accordingly. Tick the days you'll be on site.

data.name: Lunch.SetupDay
data.value: Yes, I'll be there for lunch on {0}.

data.name: Lunch.ErrPickPreDay
data.value: Please choose whether you'll join the pre-day / Master Class lunch.

data.name: Lunch.MainNote
data.value: The lunch on {0} (main day) will be booked for everyone.

data.name: Swag.AccessDenied
data.value: The swag form is only for volunteers, speakers, master-class speakers and organizers. Your role ({0}) does not receive swag.

data.name: Swag.Intro
data.value: Pick the polo (and jacket) size you'd like, or tell us you don't want one. The organizer team confirms the final allocation closer to the event.

data.name: Swag.ExtrasLegend
data.value: Extras (pre-selected — untick if you'd rather not receive them)

data.name: Swag.WantsGift
data.value: Yes, I'd like the engraved appreciation award.

data.name: Swag.WantsCredly
data.value: Yes, I'd like a Credly digital badge.

data.name: Swag.NotesPlaceholder
data.value: Anything the organizer team should know

data.name: Swag.QtyNote
data.value: Final quantity is set by the organizer based on your role (volunteers: confirmed shift-days · speakers: 1 polo · master class speakers: 2 polo · organizers: 1 polo).

data.name: Travel.AccessDenied
data.value: The travel reimbursement form is only for speakers and master-class speakers. Your role ({0}) is not eligible.

data.name: Travel.PolicyBody
data.value: — for speakers travelling from outside Denmark only. Claiming is optional.

data.name: Travel.RuleSingle
data.value: Up to EUR {0} per speaker for single-speaker sessions.

data.name: Travel.RuleCo
data.value: Up to EUR {0} per person for co-speaking sessions.

data.name: Travel.RuleOther
data.value: If neither cap fits (e.g. cheapest flight is above), choose Other and explain — we'll work with you.

data.name: Travel.RuleSubmit
data.value: Submit ticket + invoice to ELDK by {0} (30 days before the event).

data.name: Travel.ClaimLegend
data.value: Do you want to claim travel reimbursement?

data.name: Travel.ExplanationPlaceholder
data.value: Cheapest flight found, route, dates, etc.

data.name: Travel.ErrPickAmount
data.value: Choose an amount, or select "No, I'm not claiming".

data.name: Travel.ErrOtherAmount
data.value: Enter the amount in EUR (greater than 0) for "Other".

data.name: Travel.ErrOtherExplanation
data.value: An explanation is required when you choose "Other".

data.name: SpeakerForm.AccessDenied
data.value: The speaker form is only for speakers and master-class speakers. Your role ({0}) does not have a speaker profile.

data.name: SpeakerForm.Intro
data.value: A few extra details we use for badges, the website, and accreditation verification. Your public bio & social links are seeded from Sessionize but are yours to edit below — your changes are kept and won't be overwritten by the next Sessionize sync.

data.name: SpeakerForm.SignInNote
data.value: This is your community/Sessionize address. It stays your sign-in and is never changed — set a different address below if you'd rather get calendar invites and messages somewhere else.

data.name: SpeakerForm.PreferredNote
data.value: Leave blank to use your Sessionize address. When set, all calendar invites and emails — from the hub and Zoho Backstage — go here instead.

data.name: SpeakerForm.FirstTimeLegend
data.value: Is this your first time as a speaker at this event?

data.name: SpeakerForm.PreDay
data.value: Yes, I'm speaking on the pre-day (Master Class / workshop day).

data.name: SpeakerForm.MainDay
data.value: Yes, I'm speaking on the main day.

data.name: SpeakerForm.DaysNote
data.value: A pre-day speaker isn't necessarily on the main day, and vice versa. These flags drive polo and hotel-night allocation.

data.name: SpeakerForm.NotImported
data.value: Your bio / social links haven't been imported from Sessionize yet.

data.name: SpeakerForm.BioIntro
data.value: These details show on the website and in the app. They were seeded from Sessionize, but you own them here — anything you change is kept and won't be overwritten by the next Sessionize sync.

data.name: SpeakerForm.BioPlaceholder
data.value: A few sentences about you, your work and what you speak about.

data.name: SpeakerForm.TaglineNote
data.value: A short one-liner shown under your name.

data.name: SpeakerForm.PhotoNote
data.value: A link to your speaker headshot. Imported from Sessionize when available.

data.name: SpeakerForm.SessionsNote
data.value: Your sessions are managed in Sessionize and on the published agenda — edit titles, abstracts and the schedule there. Speaking-day flags (pre-day / main day) are set under Speaking days above.

data.name: SpeakerForm.ManualNote
data.value: Reference sample from a sister community — until the ELDK27 speaker manual is published, this is a good example of what to expect (logistics, venue map, presentation guidance, social-media branding).

data.name: SpeakerForm.TemplateBody
data.value: We encourage you to use the ELDK PowerPoint template for your session, but it is optional. If you choose not to use the template, please include the sponsor slide and the session-feedback evaluation slide in your presentation.

data.name: SpeakerForm.QuestionsBody
data.value: If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to write us at info@expertslive.dk or through the Signal group.

data.name: SponsorWiz.Step.details.Desc
data.value: Your website, social links and company description.

data.name: SponsorWiz.Step.coordinator.Desc
data.value: Who we should contact about your participation.

data.name: SponsorWiz.Step.contacts.Desc
data.value: Add the people who sign the contract and who coordinate the event.

data.name: SponsorWiz.Step.logos.Desc
data.value: Upload your logo and branding artwork.

data.name: SponsorWiz.Step.booth-members.Desc
data.value: List the team members staffing your booth.

data.name: SponsorWiz.Step.booth-materials.Desc
data.value: Add your booth videos and collateral.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.Intro
data.value: Let's get you set up for the event. Complete the steps below — you can stop and come back any time; your progress is saved.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.AllDone
data.value: All done — thank you! You can update any step below if anything changes.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.Nothing
data.value: There are no onboarding steps for you right now.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.Step.calendar.Desc
data.value: Optionally use a different email for calendar invites and notifications. Leave blank to use your primary email.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.Step.details.Desc
data.value: Your bio, photo, tagline, links and session preferences.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.Step.hotel.Desc
data.value: Tell us whether you need a room and your check-in / check-out dates.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.Step.dinner.Desc
data.value: RSVP for the speaker appreciation dinner and any dietary needs.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.Step.lunch.Desc
data.value: Choose your lunch and let us know any dietary requirements.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.Step.swag.Desc
data.value: Pick your shirt size and gift preferences.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.Step.travel.Desc
data.value: Submit your travel details for reimbursement.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.Step.upload-preview.Desc
data.value: Upload your draft presentation so attendees can plan their agenda.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.Step.upload-final.Desc
data.value: Upload your final presentation in PDF or PPTX format.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.Step.promote.Desc
data.value: Share your session(s) on LinkedIn with #ELDK27 #ExpertsLiveDK.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.Step.signal.Desc
data.value: Join the ELDK27 Signal chat and broadcast group, then mark this done.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.Step.party.Desc
data.value: RSVP yes or no for the party (16:00–18:30 on the pre-day). You can change your answer any time.

data.name: SpeakerWiz.Step.accept.Desc
data.value: Review and accept our Code of Conduct and Privacy Policy.

data.name: RoleWiz.Intro
data.value: Let's get you set up for the event. Complete the steps below — you can stop and come back any time; your progress is saved.

data.name: RoleWiz.AllDone
data.value: All done — thank you! You can update any step below if anything changes.

data.name: RoleWiz.Nothing
data.value: There are no get-started steps for you right now.

data.name: RoleWiz.AccessDenied
data.value: There is no get-started checklist for your role.

data.name: RoleWiz.Step.profile.Desc
data.value: Check your name and add a phone number so we can reach you.

data.name: RoleWiz.Step.availability.Desc
data.value: Tell us which days and times you can help so we can schedule you fairly.

data.name: RoleWiz.Step.hotel.Desc
data.value: Tell us whether you need a room and your check-in / check-out dates.

data.name: RoleWiz.Step.dinner.Desc
data.value: RSVP for the appreciation dinner and any dietary needs.

data.name: RoleWiz.Step.lunch.Desc
data.value: Choose your lunch and let us know any dietary requirements.

data.name: RoleWiz.Step.swag.Desc
data.value: Pick your shirt size and gift preferences.

data.name: RoleWiz.Step.travel.Desc
data.value: Submit your travel details for reimbursement.

data.name: RoleWiz.Step.signal.Desc
data.value: Join the ELDK27 Signal chat and broadcast group, then mark this done.

data.name: RoleWiz.Step.party.Desc
data.value: RSVP yes or no for the party (16:00–18:30 on the pre-day). You can change your answer any time.

data.name: RoleWiz.Step.accept.Desc
data.value: Review and accept our Code of Conduct and Privacy Policy.

data.name: Wizard.AllDone
data.value: All done — thank you! You can update any step from your hub if anything changes.

data.name: Wizard.Nothing
data.value: There are no get-started steps for you right now.

data.name: VolWiz.Closed
data.value: Volunteer sign-up is closed for this event.

data.name: VolWiz.SavedNote
data.value: You can return any time before the deadline to update your details.

data.name: VolWiz.ConfirmNoneHint
data.value: Select at least one shift to enable submit.

data.name: Lead.AccessDenied
data.value: This area is for sponsor booth staff.

data.name: Lead.NoCompany
data.value: Your sponsor account is not yet linked to a company, so we cannot file leads against it. Please contact the organizers.

data.name: Lead.Intro
data.value: Met someone at your stand? Add them here and the lead lands straight in your leads pipeline and download feed — no app, no scanner needed. Add at least an email or a phone so you can follow up.

data.name: Lead.RecentEmpty
data.value: No booth leads captured yet. The ones you add above will appear here.

data.name: Lead.RecentIntro
data.value: Your most recent booth entries (newest first). Everything you capture is also available via the download / API page above.

data.name: LeadScore.Unreachable
data.value: No email and no phone — unreachable

data.name: LeadScore.LooksTest
data.value: Looks like a test or junk entry

data.name: SponsorPortal.Intro
data.value: Hi {0} — everything for your sponsorship in one place: your profile, booth, leads, deliverables and order status.

data.name: SponsorPortal.AccessDenied
data.value: This page is for sponsors only.

data.name: SponsorPortal.NoCompany
data.value: Your sponsor account is not yet linked to a company, so we cannot show your portal. Please contact the organizers.

data.name: SponsorPortal.BoothIntro
data.value: Find your stand and the on-site practicalities.

data.name: SponsorPortal.DeliverablesIntro
data.value: What we still need from you, and what's already done.

data.name: SponsorPortal.OrderIntro
data.value: The orders we have on file and where they are in invoicing.

data.name: SponsorTasks.NoCompany
data.value: Your sponsor account is not yet linked to a company, so we cannot show your tasks. Please contact the organizers.

data.name: SponsorTasks.NoTasks
data.value: No sponsor tasks yet. Tasks appear here once your order is processed.

data.name: SponsorTasks.Intro
data.value: Tick a task off when it is done. You can reopen it if needed.

data.name: SponsorTasks.ManagedBy
data.value: Tasks can be managed by any of these contacts:

data.name: SponsorTasks.AllCaughtUp
data.value: All caught up — no pending tasks.

data.name: TaskRow.SocialIntro
data.value: Social-media company intro (max {0} chars — bullets fine)

data.name: TaskRow.EmailCopyNote
data.value: Saving sends a copy to info@expertslive.dk and mlh@expertslive.dk.

data.name: TaskRow.CompleteBeforeDue
data.value: Please complete before the due date. If not, you will receive reminder emails.

data.name: Attendee.NoRecord
data.value: We have no ticket or booking record for your email yet. If you have just purchased, please check back later.

data.name: Attendee.Multiple
data.value: You have more than one Master Class booking: {0}. Please keep one and cancel the others.

data.name: Attendee.NotReserved
data.value: You have not reserved a Master Class seat yet.

data.name: Survey.NotConfigured
data.value: No survey is configured at this URL.

data.name: Survey.JumpToTrackResults
data.value: Or jump directly to a track's results:

data.name: Survey.ThankYouTeam
data.value: Thank you from the ELDK27 organizer team:

data.name: Survey.Step1Caption
data.value: A previous Experts Live Denmark — your input shapes the next one.

data.name: Survey.Step1Heading
data.value: Which technical track excites you most?

data.name: Survey.Step1Lead
data.value: Pick one. We'll show you topic options for that track in the next step.

data.name: Survey.Step2Caption
data.value: Speakers shape the agenda. Your top three tell them what to pitch.

data.name: Survey.Step2Lead
data.value: Tap 1st next to your most-wanted topic, then 2nd for your second-favorite, then 3rd. Tap again to clear. We're asking what topics you'd love to learn about — not yet about specific sessions.

data.name: Survey.AiNote2
data.value: Heads-up: The topic titles + summaries below are AI-generated samples to give you a feel for the shape of each track. Expect the occasional odd phrasing, an unexpectedly funny summary, or a topic that reads like it was dreamt up at 3am. Pick the topics whose direction excites you most — the speakers will refine the exact session titles + angles during the Call for Speakers.

data.name: Survey.Step3Caption
data.value: Honest "I can…" answers help speakers pitch the room right.

data.name: Survey.Step3Heading
data.value: For each of your three picks, what fits you?

data.name: Survey.Step3Lead
data.value: Pick the "I can…" statement that feels closest to you. There's no wrong answer — the goal is to help speakers pitch the right depth for our audience.

data.name: Survey.AiNote3
data.value: Heads-up: The "I can…" level statements are also AI-generated samples. Funny phrasing, oddly-specific examples, and the occasional eyebrow-raising claim may appear. Match the spirit of the level you're closest to — close enough is good enough; the goal is to help speakers pitch the right depth, not to grade you.

data.name: Survey.CommentPlaceholder
data.value: Your role, what you're building right now, topics we didn't list, etc.

data.name: Survey.NoScriptNotice
data.value: This survey works best with JavaScript enabled, which guides you step by step. JavaScript appears to be turned off, so the whole survey is shown below as a single form — please fill in every section (track, your three topics with their levels) and use “Send my input” at the bottom. To get the guided experience instead, enable JavaScript in your browser settings and reload this page.

data.name: Survey.JsAllRanked
data.value: All three picks ranked. Tap "Next" to choose levels.

data.name: Survey.ClosedBody
data.value: Thanks for your interest — this survey is no longer accepting responses. You can still view the results so far.

data.name: Survey.ValTrack
data.value: Pick a track in step 1 before submitting.

data.name: Survey.ValRankThree
data.value: Rank three different topics in step 2 before submitting.

data.name: Survey.ValPicksDistinct
data.value: Your three picks must all be different topics.

data.name: Survey.ValTopicNotInTrack
data.value: One of your picks is not a topic in the selected track.

data.name: Survey.ValLevel
data.value: Pick a level (Advanced / Expert / Black Belt) for each of your three picks.

data.name: Survey.ValSaveFailed
data.value: We hit a problem saving your response. Please try again in a moment.

data.name: OrgContent.Surveys
data.value: List your surveys, share their links, open or close submissions, view results, and reset responses before a fresh send-out.

data.name: OrgSurveys.Intro
data.value: Manage every survey: copy its public links, open or close submissions, see the results, and reset responses before sending it out.

data.name: OrgSurveys.NoneBody
data.value: Surveys are defined as files under App_Data/Surveys/. Add one and it will appear here.

data.name: OrgSurveys.CopySubmitAria
data.value: Copy the public survey link to the clipboard

data.name: OrgSurveys.CopyResultsAria
data.value: Copy the public results link to the clipboard

data.name: OrgSurveys.ResetHint
data.value: This permanently deletes every response for “{0}”. There is no undo. Use it to start fresh before sending the survey out.

data.name: Results.NoResponsesYet
data.value: No responses yet. Be the first —

data.name: Results.TrackPopularityLead
data.value: How responses split across the seven technical tracks.

data.name: Results.MostWantedLead
data.value: Top 15 across all tracks, ranked by aggregate favorites. A respondent's top pick counts more than their 2nd, which counts more than their 3rd — so this list reflects what attendees most want to attend.

data.name: Results.SelfLevelLead
data.value: Helps us pick the right topics and helps speakers pitch the right depth in their Call-for-Speakers proposals.

data.name: Results.PerTrackLead
data.value: Tap a track to expand its ranked favorites — or share the per-track deep-link with a speaker so they land directly on their lane.

data.name: Results.NoPicksTrack
data.value: No picks yet in this track.

data.name: Results.DirectUrlsLead
data.value: Paste these in Slack / email to send a prospective speaker straight to their track's section of this dashboard.

data.name: Results.ShareDashboard
data.value: Share this dashboard with prospective speakers →

data.name: Welcome.RoleIntro
data.value: We're really happy you've joined us as a {0}.

data.name: Welcome.Countdown
data.value: The countdown to {0} in {1} has begun.

data.name: Welcome.WhatBody
data.value: Your one-stop place for everything you need to do before and during {0} — hotel, dinner, swag, travel, lunch and your personal task list. We've designed it so you never miss a deadline and never have to guess what's expected.

data.name: Welcome.WhyBody
data.value: We want your {0} experience to feel effortless. The Hub takes the back-and-forth emails out of the picture: pick your polo size, RSVP to the Appreciation Dinner, declare your lunch attendance — all in one place, on your own schedule.

data.name: Welcome.RightAwayHeading
data.value: A few things you can do right away

data.name: Welcome.RightAwayTasks
data.value: Check off your pending tasks at the top of the hub.

data.name: Welcome.RightAwayDinner
data.value: RSVP to the Appreciation Dinner on the evening before the conference.

data.name: Welcome.Questions
data.value: Questions? Reach us any time at

data.name: Welcome.Continue
data.value: OK, take me to my Hub

data.name: Welcome.OnceNote
data.value: You'll only see this page once. You can always reach the Hub from the Home link in the top nav.

data.name: Onboard.Heading
data.value: Welcome — let's get you set up

data.name: Onboard.Intro
data.value: A few quick steps. You can come back and change anything later.

data.name: Onboard.WantsAward
data.value: I'd like an engraved appreciation award

data.name: Onboard.WantsCredly
data.value: I'd like a digital Credly badge

data.name: Public.NoLiveEvent
data.value: There is no live event right now. Please check back soon.

data.name: Speakers.ComingSoonBody
data.value: We're finalising this year's speakers. Check back soon to meet the lineup.

data.name: Sponsors.ComingSoonBody
data.value: Our sponsors will be announced here. Interested in sponsoring? Get in touch.

data.name: Sponsors.BecomeBody
data.value: Reach a focused audience of community professionals. Get in touch to discuss sponsorship packages for this event.

data.name: Cc.AccessDenied
data.value: This area is for organizers only.

data.name: Cc.AllClear
data.value: All clear — nothing needs your attention right now.

data.name: Cc.OnboardingNone
data.value: No one is in onboarding yet.

data.name: Cc.CheckInGap
data.value: Reflects attendee self-check-in ("I'm here" on their My Event dashboard). The Zoho Backstage check-in webhook is not wired to this number, so it is not a turnstile/badge-scan count.

data.name: Cc.McNone
data.value: No master classes set up yet.

data.name: Landing.Blurb
data.value: The community event for IT professionals — sessions, master classes and a great line-up of speakers. Browse the programme below, no sign-in needed.

data.name: Landing.SessionsBlurb
data.value: Browse the full session programme — filter by type, length and room.

data.name: Landing.SpeakersBlurb
data.value: Meet this year's speakers and see what they're presenting.

data.name: Landing.SponsorsBlurb
data.value: The organisations that make this event possible.

data.name: Landing.MasterClassBlurb
data.value: Full-day, hands-on deep dives held before the main conference.

data.name: SessionDetail.AskLink
data.value: Master Class attendees: use the Group Q&A

data.name: OrgArea.CommandCenter
data.value: Your "what needs my attention" landing: registrations, onboarding completion per persona, hotel/swag/lunch/dinner headcounts, session and sponsor status, and today's / overdue tasks — every tile clicks through to the relevant grid.

data.name: OrgArea.Intro
data.value: Everything for running the event, grouped into hubs. Pick an area to drill in.

data.name: OrgArea.Dashboard
data.value: Live snapshot: form completion, task status, sponsor progress, attendee reconciliation, volunteer coverage, plus the cross-role event overview.

data.name: OrgArea.Sponsors
data.value: Sponsor directory, task catalog, leads from Zoho, the per-sponsor status dashboard and the attendee app game.

data.name: OrgArea.Audit
data.value: The acting-as (impersonation) log: who viewed or acted on whose behalf, and when.

data.name: OrgArea.MismatchesNeedReview
data.value: attendee(s) need review — ticket and Master Class booking do not line up.

data.name: OrgPeople.Intro
data.value: Manage everyone in the event: participants, the pre-selection queue, onboarding progress, attendees and late-change action items.

data.name: OrgPeople.Participants
data.value: View all participants, filter by role and active/inactive status, and deactivate anyone who has dropped out.

data.name: OrgPeople.Preselection
data.value: Prospective volunteers, speakers and media-team waiting for review. Validate the data, then preselect or activate.

data.name: OrgPeople.Onboarding
data.value: Who has — and hasn't — completed each onboarding step (bio, picture, hotel, appreciation, swag). Re-open a step to queue a reminder.

data.name: OrgPeople.Attendees
data.value: Browse the full reconciled attendee list with filters, search and CSV export.

data.name: OrgPeople.ActionQueue
data.value: Late participant changes (hotel, dinner) made near the lock date that need re-confirming with a vendor.

data.name: OrgComms.Intro
data.value: Everything that sends mail: the email center, the delivery ledger, broadcasts, invitations, welcome logins and speaker reminders.

data.name: OrgComms.EmailCenter
data.value: Preview every branded email template, send yourself a test copy, and browse the delivery ledger.

data.name: OrgComms.EmailLog
data.value: The full delivery ledger of what the reminder engine actually sent.

data.name: OrgComms.Broadcast
data.value: Send one branded message to whole role groups with per-subject dedup so retries never double-mail.

data.name: OrgComms.SendInvitations
data.value: Send the role-tailored invitation email to participants who have not yet been invited.

data.name: OrgComms.SendWelcome
data.value: Send every active participant the welcome email with a one-click auto-login link.

data.name: OrgComms.SpeakerReminders
data.value: Send speakers their milestone reminders (bio, picture, session details, travel).

data.name: OrgContent.Intro
data.value: Manage the programme: speakers, sessions, audience questions and evaluations, plus the Sessionize import and its endpoint settings.

data.name: OrgContent.Speakers
data.value: Manage the speaker roster, profiles and statuses.

data.name: OrgContent.Sessions
data.value: Manage the session catalog, schedule and rooms.

data.name: OrgContent.SessionQuestions
data.value: Moderate audience questions submitted for each session.

data.name: OrgContent.SessionEvaluations
data.value: Review attendee session evaluations and scores.

data.name: OrgContent.SessionizeImport
data.value: Pull accepted speakers from Sessionize and add them as participants. Set or change the Sessionize endpoint for this edition.

data.name: OrgContent.SyncQueue
data.value: Review and approve (or reject) detected session sync changes before they are applied. CEH never auto-applies a change or auto-deletes.

data.name: OrgVolunteers.Intro
data.value: Build the volunteer work structure and allocate volunteers to buckets and tasks.

data.name: OrgVolunteers.Structure
data.value: Build the volunteer work tree (Category → Subcategory → Task), name leads and supervisors, and assign volunteers to tasks.

data.name: OrgVolunteers.Buckets
data.value: Allocate volunteers into buckets and balance coverage across the work tree.

data.name: OrgLogistics.Intro
data.value: Hotels and rooming, swag, travel reimbursements, lunch headcount and company group photos.

data.name: OrgLogistics.Hotels
data.value: Manage the hotel list, then assign participants to rooms and check-in/out dates.

data.name: OrgLogistics.Swag
data.value: Manage the swag order and per-person picks.

data.name: OrgLogistics.Travel
data.value: Review and approve travel reimbursement claims.

data.name: OrgLogistics.Lunch
data.value: Track the lunch headcount and dietary needs.

data.name: OrgLogistics.GroupPhotos
data.value: Register company photo sessions, schedule slots, and send calendar invites to the lead contact and internal participants.

data.name: OrgSoMe.Intro
data.value: Social-media graphics, the publishing queue, channel settings and where the brand assets live.

data.name: OrgSoMe.Graphics
data.value: Generate and manage the branded social-media graphics for speakers and sponsors.

data.name: OrgSoMe.ContentStudio
data.value: Generate WordPress drafts and LinkedIn text from ticket-sales and master-class data.

data.name: OrgSoMe.Queue
data.value: The queue of social posts ready to publish across channels.

data.name: OrgSoMe.Settings
data.value: Configure the social-media channels and posting defaults.

data.name: OrgSoMe.AssetLocations
data.value: Where the brand assets, logos and templates live for this edition.

data.name: OrgSetup.Intro
data.value: Cross-cutting configuration for this edition: calendar sync, the Sessionize endpoint and social-media settings.

data.name: OrgSetup.Calendar
data.value: Let participants subscribe their deadlines, shifts and tasks to their own calendar, and attach an .ics invite to activation emails.

data.name: OrgSetup.Sessionize
data.value: Set or change the Sessionize endpoint used to import speakers and sessions.

data.name: OrgSetup.SoMe
data.value: Configure the social-media channels and posting defaults.

data.name: OrgSetup.Settings
data.value: Turn the optional integrations and automation on or off for this edition, and control all outbound email.

data.name: Settings.Intro
data.value: The core hub — sign-in, search, viewing and editing, the public pages — is always on. Everything below is optional: turn each capability on only when you are ready, and test it before wider use. New capabilities start switched off.

data.name: Settings.DependencyWarning
data.value: {0} is on but its prerequisite {1} is off, so it stays inert until you enable {1}.

data.name: Settings.KillSwitchHelp
data.value: The master switch for all email leaving the hub. Turn it off to instantly stop every send — sign-in codes, welcomes, reminders and digests — across the web app and the background jobs. Recipients are also limited by the safe-recipient allowlist; nothing is ever sent to people outside it.

data.name: Settings.AllowlistEmpty
data.value: No allowlist configured — every send is blocked (fail-closed).

data.name: Settings.RedirectNone
data.value: No redirect (mail goes to the real recipient, if allowed).

data.name: Settings.KillSwitchConfig
data.value: The master email switch is currently forced OFF by the environment configuration. Nothing will send until that is changed.

data.name: Settings.JobsHelp
data.value: The master switch for every scheduled background job — welcome and reminder sends, the Backstage and WooCommerce pulls, digests, and all other timers. Pause it to instantly stop all of them; resume to start again. Each job re-checks this before it runs, so resume takes effect on the next scheduled tick.

data.name: Settings.JobsDetail
data.value: When paused, every timer job no-ops without doing any work or sending anything. This does not change your per-feature switches or rings — it is a single operational stop/start for the whole scheduler.

data.name: Settings.JobsPausedWarn
data.value: Background jobs are currently PAUSED — no scheduled work is running. Resume to start the scheduler again.

data.name: Settings.RingBadgeTitle
data.value: This feature is still in controlled rollout (not released to Broad/GA). Only participants at or below this ring see it — promote it up the rings as you test, then set it to Broad to release to everyone.

data.name: Settings.GroupRingBadgeTitle
data.value: This whole group is still in controlled rollout (not Broad/GA). Features in it that have no override inherit this ring.

data.name: Settings.GroupRingAria
data.value: Choose the lifecycle ring for the {0} group

data.name: Settings.AssignRingsLink
data.value: Assign a ring per person or sponsor company

data.name: ConfigEditor.Intro
data.value: Edit the per-edition configuration values for this event. Each setting shows its current effective value and whether you have changed it from the shipped default. Change a value and Save, or Reset a changed value back to the default. Changes take effect immediately — no redeploy.

data.name: ConfigEditor.SecretsNote
data.value: Secrets (API keys, passwords, connection strings) are never editable here — they live securely in the key vault. Lists and email templates are edited elsewhere.

data.name: ConfigEditor.NoScalars
data.value: No editable settings in this section yet.

data.name: Rings.Intro
data.value: Give a person or sponsor company an early-access ring (ring 0–3). Lower rings get features earlier: a feature released to ring 1, for example, is active for anyone in ring 0 or 1. Everyone starts in ring 3 (broad), so a fully-released feature reaches all. A sponsor contact's own ring overrides their company's default ring.

data.name: Rings.SponsorCompanies
data.value: Sponsor companies (default ring for their contacts)

data.name: Settings.Feat.OutboundEmail.Desc
data.value: The global on/off for all email leaving the hub. Off means no send of any kind, anywhere.

data.name: Settings.Feat.WelcomeEmail.Desc
data.value: Send each person a branded welcome when they are activated.

data.name: Settings.Feat.MagicLink.Desc
data.value: Include a magic-link button that signs the recipient in automatically.

data.name: Settings.Feat.SpeakerGraphicsPromote.Desc
data.value: Email each speaker when their promo graphics are released, pointing them to the Help Promote page to share on LinkedIn. Sent once per speaker; ring-scoped.

data.name: Settings.Feat.BackstageSpeakerSync.Desc
data.value: On Save & sync, create a speaker in Zoho Backstage when they don't exist yet. The Backstage API is create-only, so an existing speaker is never duplicated — info@ is emailed to update them manually. Ring-scoped; off by default.

data.name: Settings.Feat.Sessionize.Desc
data.value: Import accepted speakers and sessions from your Sessionize endpoint.

data.name: Settings.Feat.SessionChangeAlerts.Desc
data.value: Automatically detect when a session's time or room changes in Zoho Backstage and email the affected speaker(s). Ring-scoped; off by default. Ring 0/1 testers get alerts immediately; ring 2/3 only from the configured go-live date.

data.name: Settings.Feat.SpeakerChangeAlerts.Desc
data.value: Automatically detect when a speaker's name, tagline, bio, country or social links change in Zoho Backstage and queue the change for your approval. Off by default; never auto-applied. Requires the speaker sync direction set to Zoho to CEH.

data.name: Settings.Feat.BackstageSync.Desc
data.value: Mirror sponsors and exhibitors into Zoho Backstage and notify the coordinator.

data.name: Settings.Feat.EconomicErp.Desc
data.value: Create and reconcile sponsor customers and orders in the e-conomic accounting system.

data.name: Settings.Feat.SoMe.Desc
data.value: Schedule and publish posts on a calendar across your social channels.

data.name: Settings.Feat.ContentStudio.Desc
data.value: Generate WordPress drafts and LinkedIn post text from ticket-sales and master-class data. Drafts only — nothing is published automatically.

data.name: Settings.Feat.LinkedIn.Desc
data.value: Publish the scheduled posts to your LinkedIn company page, with a pre-alert before speaker posts.

data.name: Settings.Feat.Surveys.Desc
data.value: Collect session evaluations and event-wide survey responses from attendees.

data.name: Settings.Feat.ReminderJobs.Desc
data.value: Run the daily background job that seeds deadlines and reminds people of upcoming tasks.

data.name: Settings.Feat.DigestEmails.Desc
data.value: Email speakers and organizers periodic digests (open questions, re-opened steps).

data.name: Settings.Feat.SponsorOrderPull.Desc
data.value: Pull completed sponsor and exhibitor orders from the webshop and expand their onboarding tasks.

data.name: Settings.Feat.SponsorZohoProvision.Desc
data.value: After the order pull, create or link each sponsor and exhibitor in Zoho Backstage from webshop data (replaces the legacy sync script). Existing companies are never overwritten.

data.name: Settings.Feat.ErpWebshopReconcile.Desc
data.value: Every 30 minutes, create missing webshop users from the e-conomic group-1 sponsor contacts and set each company default signer + event coordinator from the contact roles (never overwriting a curated value). Contacts missing a role are emailed to the organizer. Replaces the legacy ERP-contacts sync script.

data.name: Settings.Feat.SponsorLeads.Desc
data.value: Pull captured leads from the CRM and send each sponsor a delta digest of their new leads.

data.name: Settings.Feat.SponsorUploadWatch.Desc
data.value: Watch each sponsor's upload folder and notify the team when a file is added or replaced.

data.name: Settings.Feat.AttendeeReconcile.Desc
data.value: Reconcile tickets and master-class bookings and chase attendees about mismatches.

data.name: Settings.Feat.AttendeeWelcome.Desc
data.value: Auto-create a hub account for each 2-day ticket holder and email them a one-click sign-in link. Sends real email to attendees — turn on deliberately.

data.name: Settings.Feat.BroadcastEmail.Desc
data.value: Compose and send mass or one-off email to a chosen audience. Reaches real people — ring-test before going broad.

data.name: Settings.Feat.InvitationEmail.Desc
data.value: Email an invitation with a personal sign-in link to each selected person.

data.name: Settings.Feat.EmailResend.Desc
data.value: Re-send a previously sent or templated email to a participant.

data.name: Settings.Feat.OnboardingStepReset.Desc
data.value: Bulk-email people asking them to redo a specific onboarding step.

data.name: Settings.Feat.ParticipantActivation.Desc
data.value: Activate or provision login-capable accounts (pre-selection queue, bulk participant ops) — enables sign-in for real people.

data.name: Settings.Feat.MasterClassInvites.Desc
data.value: Send Master Class invitation and waitlist-promotion emails with self-service seat links.

data.name: Settings.Feat.SessionEvalEmail.Desc
data.value: Email each speaker their session evaluation (HappyOrNot) results.

data.name: Settings.Feat.SponsorWelcome.Desc
data.value: Send (or re-send) the sponsor welcome / intro email per company or to all sponsors.

data.name: Settings.Feat.SponsorTasks.Desc
data.value: Create onboarding tasks for sponsor companies — they appear to every sponsor contact.

data.name: Settings.Feat.SponsorReminders.Desc
data.value: Email reminders to sponsors (e.g. the app game).

data.name: Settings.Feat.VolunteerTasks.Desc
data.value: Create volunteer tasks and assign volunteers — tasks appear to the assigned people.

data.name: Settings.Feat.VolunteerAllocation.Desc
data.value: Commit volunteer shift / bucket allocations to many volunteers at once.

data.name: Settings.Feat.OrganizerAllocation.Desc
data.value: Commit task allocations to many organizers at once (the organizer-side mirror of volunteer allocation).

data.name: Settings.Feat.HotelAssignment.Desc
data.value: Assign hotels and rooms to participants.

data.name: Settings.Feat.GroupPhotoInvites.Desc
data.value: Email group-photo session invitations to participants.

data.name: Settings.Feat.TravelReimbursementEmail.Desc
data.value: Email a payment confirmation when a travel reimbursement is marked paid.

data.name: Settings.Feat.GraphicsRelease.Desc
data.value: Release social-media graphics to speakers — they become visible in the speaker's area.

data.name: Settings.Feat.TestDataCleanup.Desc
data.value: Bulk-delete test participants and data. Destructive — ring-test only.

data.name: Settings.Feat.HotelInvite.Desc
data.value: Email the hotel booking calendar invite (.ics) to a participant when their booking is submitted or confirmed.

data.name: Settings.Feat.DinnerInvite.Desc
data.value: Email the appreciation-dinner calendar invite (.ics) to a participant when they confirm attendance.

data.name: Sezimport.WouldOverwrite
data.value: This full import would overwrite bio fields.

data.name: Sezimport.NoOverwrite
data.value: No existing bio fields would be overwritten.

data.name: Sezimport.DeltaNoOverwrite
data.value: Delta is additive — it only fills empty, never-edited fields, so no bios would be overwritten.

data.name: Sessions.DeleteBlocked
data.value: This session has attendee data and cannot be deleted. Handle that data first.

data.name: Sessions.BulkDeleteHint
data.value: Only sessions with no attendee data can be selected. Sessions with questions, evaluations or master-class signups are protected.

data.name: Sessions.BulkDeleteConfirmBody
data.value: This permanently removes {0} selected session(s) and their speaker links. Imported sessions return on the next Sessionize import. This cannot be undone.

data.name: MyEvent.NoMySessions
data.value: You're not registered for any sessions yet. Reserve your Master Class above, then it'll show up here.

data.name: MyEvent.NoAgenda
data.value: The agenda isn't published yet. Check back closer to the event.

data.name: MyEvent.AskAndEvaluateHelp
data.value: Use the "Ask a question" link on any session to send the speaker a question before the event, and "Rate this session" to leave feedback afterwards.

data.name: MyEvent.QuickLinksHelp
data.value: Outstanding items also appear in your checklist below.

data.name: MyEvent.AskEvaluateNotOpenHint
data.value: The "ask a question" and "rate this session" links become available during the session.

data.name: Dinner.ErrPickRsvp
data.value: Please pick YES, NO or MAYBE so we know how many to plan for.

data.name: Dinner.AllergyExtraLabel
data.value: Anything else we should know about your food?

data.name: Hotel.ErrPickNeed
data.value: Please choose whether you need a hotel room.

data.name: Swag.ErrPickPolo
data.value: Pick a polo size, or choose the "no polo" option.

data.name: Diet.SpeakerNote
data.value: For the food served on your speaking day(s). The Appreciation Dinner has its own form.

data.name: Diet.AllergensLegend
data.value: Allergens to avoid (tick all that apply)

data.name: Diet.OtherPlaceholder
data.value: e.g. a specific intolerance not listed above

data.name: OrgArea.Exports
data.value: Downloadable CSV exports and print-friendly run-sheets for on-site operations: attendee list, lunch headcount, room/session sheets, volunteer rota and badge data.

data.name: Exports.Intro
data.value: On-site operations still run on paper. Download each list as CSV, or print this page for offline run-sheets.

data.name: Exports.PrintHint
data.value: Tip: use your browser's Print to save a tidy PDF — the download buttons and menus are hidden on paper.

data.name: Exports.DownloadAttendees
data.value: Download the attendee list as CSV

data.name: Exports.NoAttendees
data.value: No attendees have been reconciled yet.

data.name: Exports.DownloadLunch
data.value: Download the lunch headcount as CSV

data.name: Exports.NoLunch
data.value: Nobody has signed up for a pre-conference lunch yet.

data.name: Exports.DownloadRooms
data.value: Download the room sheets as CSV

data.name: Exports.NoRooms
data.value: No sessions have been added yet.

data.name: Exports.DownloadRota
data.value: Download the volunteer rota as CSV

data.name: Exports.NoRota
data.value: No volunteers have been assigned to tasks yet.

data.name: Exports.DownloadBadges
data.value: Download the badge data as CSV

data.name: Exports.NoBadges
data.value: No active participants to print badges for yet.

data.name: Comms.CockpitIntro
data.value: One place to schedule, send and track all your email and social posts — who got what, what didn't reach them, and what's going out next.

data.name: Comms.AllDelivered
data.value: Everything has been delivered — nothing failed or was dropped.

data.name: Comms.ResendIntro
data.value: These people had a message that did not reach them. Resend it in one click.

data.name: Comms.NoResend
data.value: Nothing to resend — every message reached its recipient.

data.name: Comms.ResendHint
data.value: The resend uses the same per-person send as the Email Center and is itself logged here.

data.name: Comms.NoUpcoming
data.value: Nothing is scheduled to go out.

data.name: Comms.WhoGotWhatIntro
data.value: Per-person delivery from the real send log — the actual outcome, never a hopeful tally.

data.name: Comms.NoEmails
data.value: No emails on record yet for this edition.

data.name: Comms.TimelineIntro
data.value: Everything that went out and is going out — email and social — in one feed.

data.name: Speakers.RemoveConfirmBody
data.value: This removes the speaker profile (bio, photo, accreditation) but keeps the person as a participant. A speaker still linked to a session is protected. This cannot be undone for:

data.name: Speakers.BulkRemoveHint
data.value: Removes the speaker profile only; the person stays a participant. Speakers still on the agenda are protected.

data.name: Speakers.BulkRemoveConfirmBody
data.value: This removes the speaker profile of {0} selected person(s); they stay participants. Anyone still linked to a session is kept. This cannot be undone.

data.name: SponsorFacts.OrphanIntro
data.value: These sponsor company-facts rows (logo, description, website, tier) drive the public sponsors page, but their company has no active contact in this edition — usually a duplicate or a wrong company id. Delete the stale ones so they no longer show publicly.

data.name: SponsorFacts.DeleteConfirmBody
data.value: This permanently removes the logo, description, website and tier for this company. It only works while the company has no active contact. This cannot be undone for:

data.name: OnbExport.Intro
data.value: Download everyone still working through onboarding (anyone who hasn't finished every step their role needs), with the steps each person is still missing — so you can chase them down.

data.name: OnbExport.DownloadAria
data.value: Download the list of people who have not finished onboarding as a CSV file

data.name: OnbReopen.Heading
data.value: Re-open a step for the whole group

data.name: OnbReopen.Intro
data.value: Pick a step to re-open for everyone in {0} who has already completed it — for example when a deadline moves and you need the whole group to confirm again. A reminder is queued for each affected person.

data.name: OnbReopen.SubmitAria
data.value: Re-open the selected step for every matching person in this group

data.name: OnbReopen.Confirm
data.value: Re-open this step for everyone in {0} who has completed it? Each of them will get a reminder to do it again.

data.name: ReqChange.Intro
data.value: This form is closed for editing, but you can still ask the organizers to update your {0} details. Tell us what needs changing and we will take care of it.

data.name: ReqChange.MessageLabel
data.value: What would you like changed about your {0}?

data.name: ReqChange.MessagePlaceholder
data.value: For example: my arrival date moved to the 8th, please change my check-in.

data.name: ReqChange.MessageHelp
data.value: Be as specific as you can. An organizer will read this and follow up with you.

data.name: ReqChange.SentFlash
data.value: Thanks — your change request has reached the organizers.

data.name: ReqChange.OpenIntro
data.value: These requests have reached the organizers and are waiting to be handled.

data.name: ReqChange.ErrEmpty
data.value: Please describe what you would like changed.

data.name: ReqChange.ErrTooLong
data.value: Your message is too long. Please shorten it to 1000 characters or fewer.

data.name: ReqChange.ErrGeneric
data.value: Sorry, your request could not be sent. Please try again.

data.name: SpeakerQ.DigestNote
data.value: Each of your master classes has its own Group Q&A board — questions and replies stay with the master class they belong to and are never merged across your classes.

data.name: SpeakerQ.AllAnswered
data.value: No open questions right now — you're all caught up.

data.name: SpeakerEval.Intro
data.value: How attendees rated your sessions (1–5), with their anonymous comments. Ratings come from the physical session evaluation device in the room + the QR code evaluation form.

data.name: SpeakerEval.None
data.value: No ratings yet. As soon as attendees rate your sessions, their scores and comments will show up here.

data.name: SpeakerEval.SessionNone
data.value: No ratings for this session yet.

data.name: SpeakerEval.NoComments
data.value: Ratings only — no written comments for this session.

data.name: Agenda.NothingScheduled
data.value: The running order is not published yet. Please check back closer to the event.

data.name: Agenda.UnscheduledNote
data.value: {0} session(s) do not have a time yet — find them in the session list.

data.name: Landing.AgendaBlurb
data.value: The full programme, day by day, in running order.

data.name: EmailCenter.TestToAddressLegend
data.value: Send a test copy to any address

data.name: EmailCenter.TestToAddressHelp
data.value: Type any mailbox to check it really receives mail. If the address is not on the allowlist the hub tells you it was dropped instead of sending nowhere.

data.name: Plan.Intro
data.value: Save the talks you want to attend and build your own running order. This is just your personal list — it does not book a seat.

data.name: Plan.Empty
data.value: You haven't saved any talks yet. Browse the programme below and tap Save to add one.

data.name: Plan.BrowseHelp
data.value: Tap Save to add a talk to your plan, or Remove to take it out.

data.name: Plan.NothingToBrowse
data.value: No talks have been published yet. Please check back closer to the event.

data.name: Plan.IcsHeading
data.value: Add my plan to my calendar

data.name: Plan.IcsHelp
data.value: Download your saved talks as a calendar file and open it in Outlook, Google or Apple Calendar. Re-download any time — your calendar updates, it never duplicates.

data.name: Plan.IcsDownloadAria
data.value: Download my saved talks as a calendar file

data.name: Plan.IcsNoneScheduled
data.value: None of your saved talks has a confirmed time yet, so there is nothing to add to a calendar. Check back once the programme is scheduled.

data.name: OrgHotels.RoomBlockSizeHelp
data.value: How many rooms you have held here. Leave blank if you haven't agreed a block yet.

data.name: OrgHotels.ConfirmationNumberHelp
data.value: Enter the number the hotel releases once the room block is confirmed. Saving it marks the reservation CONFIRMED and re-sends an updated calendar invite to everyone placed in this hotel.

data.name: RoomBlocks.Intro
data.value: For each hotel, see the rooms you reserved against the people you have placed there. Only people who said they need a room count against the block.

data.name: RoomBlocks.NoHotels
data.value: No hotels yet. Add a hotel first, then place people and set its room block.

data.name: RoomBlocks.PlanOk
data.value: Every hotel is within its block and everyone who needs a room has a hotel.

data.name: RoomBlocks.PlanWarn
data.value: Needs attention: {0} hotel(s) over their block and {1} person(s) needing a room not yet placed.

data.name: RoomBlocks.RollupAria
data.value: Room block totals across all hotels

data.name: OrgSetup.TestData
data.value: Before the edition goes live, clear out the synthetic test cast so they never skew real counts or get real messages.

data.name: TestCleanup.Intro
data.value: Everyone marked as a test user is listed below. Removing them clears the synthetic test cast so they never appear in counts, exports or emails once the edition is live. Real registrations are never touched.

data.name: TestCleanup.NoneHeading
data.value: No test users to clean up

data.name: TestCleanup.None
data.value: This edition has no test users — there is nothing to clean up.

data.name: TestCleanup.Summary
data.value: {0} test user(s) found: {1} will be removed and {2} kept but deactivated (they picked up data during testing).

data.name: TestCleanup.ConfirmBody
data.value: This removes or deactivates {0} test user(s) in this edition. Real participants are not affected. Continue?

data.name: CalPreview.Intro
data.value: These are the items your own calendar feed contains right now — exactly what a calendar app shows after you subscribe. Built live from your deadlines, shifts and tasks.

data.name: CalPreview.Empty
data.value: Your feed has no dated items yet — once you have deadlines, shifts or dated tasks they appear here.

data.name: SessOv.NonePublished
data.value: No sessions have been published yet. Please check back closer to the event.

data.name: SessOv.AskLink
data.value: Master Class attendees: use the Group Q&A

data.name: MC.NotFoundBody
data.value: This logistics page is not available.

data.name: MC.NoLogistics
data.value: No logistics have been published yet. Please check back closer to the event.

data.name: MC.EditHeading
data.value: Edit logistics (you are an involved speaker / organizer)

data.name: MC.EditPlaceholder
data.value: e.g. Bring your laptop fully charged. Install the required tools beforehand. Pre-download the sample files (see link)...

data.name: MC.EditHelp
data.value: Plain text. This is public — do not include anything sensitive.

data.name: Broadcast.TokensIntro
data.value: Type any of these in the subject or message. Each is replaced per recipient when the email is sent. Select one to insert it where your cursor is.

data.name: Broadcast.TokenFirstNameMeaning
data.value: the recipient's first name (falls back to “there”)

data.name: Alloc.AutoAssignVolunteerHelp
data.value: Reads each volunteer's day availability and proposes assignments to cover every task's needed resources. Proposals land in the queue below for you to review and edit — nobody is notified until you commit.

data.name: Alloc.AutoAssignOrganizerHelp
data.value: Reads each organizer's day availability and proposes assignments to cover organizer-owned tasks. Proposals land in the queue below for you to review and edit — nobody is notified until you commit.

data.name: Alloc.SourceProposedTitle
data.value: Auto-proposed by the availability engine — review before committing.

data.name: Alloc.SourceQueuedTitle
data.value: Hand-queued by a lead or organizer.

data.name: Alloc.DraftEmpty
data.value: No pending allocations. Run auto-assign or add people to tasks below to build a draft, then commit.

data.name: Alloc.OrganizersOnly
data.value: This area is for organizers only.

data.name: Alloc.Organizer.Intro
data.value: Allocate organizer-owned tasks to the organizing team. Run availability auto-assign to propose coverage, tweak the queue (green = enough people, red = short), then commit — assignments only become real, and people only get notified, on commit.

data.name: Alloc.Organizer.NoTasks
data.value: No tasks yet. Import the plan on the Buckets & allocation page first.

data.name: Alloc.Organizer.CommitConfirmBody
data.value: This turns {count} draft allocation(s) into real assignments now. Only organizers within the feature’s released ring are committed (others stay in the queue). This affects real people — are you sure?
